projectDescription: A comprehensive platform for managing dance and arts clubs, teacher scheduling, and school communications.
keyFeatures: Club and school management with status tracking
Teacher scheduling and cover assignment system
Broadcast messaging via SMS and email
Interactive calendar for managing cover occurrences
publicApiSurface: Club Management: CRUD operations for clubs, schools, and cover rules
Teacher Management: Manage teacher profiles, assignments, and availability
Cover Scheduling: Create and manage cover occurrences and assignments
Broadcasts: Send targeted messages to teachers via multiple channels
Calendar: View and manage cover schedules with drag-and-drop
Dashboard: View KPIs and upcoming agenda items
Authentication: Supabase auth with protected routes
